assetFormat: classic-colon CODE:ISSUER (e.g. BLND:GDJEHTBE...). SAC C-addresses are NOT accepted.
amountFormat: human units, decimal string. "1000" = 1000 BLND. NOT stroops: passing 10000000000 is interpreted as 10e9 units and gives nonsense.
feeNote: The 'fee' param is an OPTIONAL profit-skim percentage (strictly > 0; 0/0.0/0.00/null/false rejected with 'Invalid params: fee'). OMIT it entirely to get the gross optimized_sum with no skim (fee_path:null). Literal fee=0 is impossible; omission realizes the design's 'fee=0 => brute' intent. fee=30 reproduces StellarTerm's UI default 30% skim.
